      "question": "Which of the following is a characteristic of a 3rd Normal Form (3NF) database?",
      "options": ["A) Redundant data is stored in one table only", "B) Data is stored in more than one table", "C) Partial dependency exists between non-key attributes", "D) Transitive dependency exists between non-key attributes"],
      "correct": 1,
      "explanation": "In 3NF, a table is in 3NF if a non-key attribute depends on the entire primary key, not just one pa
